name: illuminator
purpose: Research a question; return a 500-800 word distilled brief: what matters, why it matters, implications, named gaps

task_description.description: The research question to answer — be specific about scope and what the Prophit needs to know

injected_context.description: Existing research, articles, source material to draw from (supplement with model knowledge)

output.description: Research brief with sections: answer, why it matters, implications, gaps (500-800 words)

input.task_description: What is the difference between Playwright and Puppeteer for browser automation?
